message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Worker for T6 State Machine">
You are worker-6, member of team dev-taskflow-m1m2m3m6.
Superior: Team Lead (TL).
Allowed contacts: TL only.

YOUR TASK:
T6: M3 — Task State Machine
Build TaskStateMachineService, TaskStatusController, StatusUpdateRequest, TransitionResponse.

Acceptance criteria (M3 AC1-AC16):
- PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status: validate transition → update status + updatedAt → 200 TaskResponse
- GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions: return currentStatus + availableTransitions → 200
- Legal transitions: TODO→IN_PROGRESS, IN_PROGRESS→TODO, IN_PROGRESS→DONE, DONE→CLOSED
- All other transitions → 400 with error message
- CLOSED is terminal (no outgoing transitions)
- Available transitions: TODO→[IN_PROGRESS], IN_PROGRESS→[TODO,DONE], DONE→[CLOSED], CLOSED→[]
- 404 for non-existent task, 401 without token
- StatusUpdateRequest: status(TaskStatus, @NotNull)
- TransitionResponse: currentStatus(TaskStatus), availableTransitions(List<TaskStatus>)

File Scope:
- ALLOWED: taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskStateMachineService.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskStatusController.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/StatusUpdateRequest.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TransitionResponse.java
- READONLY: taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepository.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/ResourceNotFoundException.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthController.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN

REQUIRED READING (do this FIRST):
1. PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-PLAN.md
2. CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-CONTRACT.md
3. Test files: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskStatusControllerTest.java
4. Implementation notes: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/temp/impl-notes-6.md
5. ALL READONLY files (especially Task entity, TaskStatus enum, GlobalExceptionHandler)

YOUR JOB:
- Write code that passes ALL 27 tests in TaskStatusControllerTest
- State transition validation: use a Map or switch to define legal transitions
- For illegal transitions, throw an exception that GlobalExceptionHandler can catch (or create IllegalStateException handling)
- Note: GlobalExceptionHandler may need to handle IllegalStateException/IllegalArgumentException → 400. If it doesn't already, you may need to handle it in your controller with @ExceptionHandler or report to TL.

PARALLEL AWARENESS:
ONLY run YOUR tests:
cd C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend && mvn test -Dtest="TaskStatusControllerTest" -pl .

LOG WRITING:
Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/logs/worker-6.log.md

COMPLETION SEQUENCE:
1. Verify all 27 tests pass
1.5. git diff --name-only → compare against ALLOWED. Revert out-of-scope.
2. Write final log entries
3. SendMessage TL: task ID, status, tests, changed files
4. Wait for shutdown
</teammate-message>

[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow backend (Auth+CRUD+StateMachine) and frontend (TaskListPage) as a Spring Boot 3 + Vue 3 full-stack app
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Spring Security + JWT (jjwt 0.12.5) | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vue Router + Axios | Vitest + jsdom for frontend tests | spring-boot-starter-test for backend tests
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig already exists with JwtAuthenticationFilter import

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format: {message:string, timestamp:ISO8601} via GlobalExceptionHandler | auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header, userId extracted from token claims | password: bcrypt via PasswordEncoder bean | soft-delete: Task.deleted=true, all queries exclude deleted | pagination: PageResponse{content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages} | status-colors: TODO=#6B7280 IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6 DONE=#10B981 CLOSED=#EF4444 | priority-colors: HIGH=#EF4444 MEDIUM=#F59E0B LOW=#10B981

[SECTION] Tasks
[TASK] id=T1 | name=M1 — User Entity + Auth DTOs | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+DTO, no logic
[TASK] id=T2 | name=M1 — JWT Security Infrastructure | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=3 | complexity=LOW | reason=standalone JWT util+filter, no cross-module
[TASK] id=T3 | name=M1 — Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling | spec=S1 | deps=T1,T2 | files=5 | complexity=MED | reason=auth logic with security integration, cross-module deps
[TASK] id=T4 | name=M2 — Task Entity + Repository | spec=S2,S3 | deps=none | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+repo+enum, no logic
[TASK] id=T5 | name=M2 — Task CRUD API | spec=S2 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=MED | reason=CRUD with pagination+filtering, auth integration
[TASK] id=T6 | name=M3 — Task State Machine | spec=S3 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=simple state transition logic, few files
[TASK] id=T7 | name=M6 — Frontend Infrastructure + Store | spec=S4 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=Pinia store+axios+router, complex mocking in tests
[TASK] id=T8 | name=M6 — Frontend Task List Components | spec=S4 | deps=T7 | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=5 Vue components, jsdom+vue-test-utils mocking

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1, T2, T4 (parallel) → T3 | T3 + T4 → T5, T6 (parallel) | T7 → T8
[WAVE] 1a=T1,T2,T4 | 1b=T7 | 2=T3 | 3a=T5,T6 | 3b=T8

     9→

    11→- Package: `com.taskflow.dto`

    14→

    17→- Transition rules (Map<TaskStatus, List<TaskStatus>>):
    18→  - TODO -> [IN_PROGRESS]
    19→  - IN_PROGRESS -> [TODO, DONE]
    20→  - DONE -> [CLOSED]
    21→  - CLOSED -> [] (terminal)
    22→- Methods:
    23→  - `TaskResponse updateStatus(Long taskId, String targetStatus)` — validate transition, update task, save, return TaskResponse
    24→  - `TransitionResponse getAvailableTransitions(Long taskId)` — look up current status, return allowed next statuses
    25→- Throws `ResourceNotFoundException` if task not found (or task.isDeleted())
    26→- Throws `IllegalStateTransitionException` (or similar, caught by GlobalExceptionHandler) if transition is illegal -> 400
    27→
    28→### 4. `TaskStatusController.java` (Controller)
    29→- Package: `com.taskflow.controller`
    30→- Endpoints:
    31→  - `PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status` — accepts `StatusUpdateRequest`, returns `TaskResponse`

    34→

    37→TODO ---> IN_PROGRESS ---> DONE ---> CLOSED (terminal)
    38→      <---

    42→- Use an EnumMap<TaskStatus, List<TaskStatus>> for transition rules — clean and O(1) lookup
    43→- IllegalStateException or custom exception for illegal transitions
    44→- GlobalExceptionHandler needs a handler for the illegal transition exception -> 400
    45→- Task entity already has @PreUpdate that sets updatedAt, so just saving the task after status change handles AC10
    46→- Must check task.isDeleted() == false when finding task; if deleted, treat as 404
    47→
    48→## Error Response Format

    51→## Test Dependencies

file.content:
# Implementation Notes — T6: M3 Task State Machine

## Required Files (for worker)

### 1. `StatusUpdateRequest.java` (DTO)
- Package: `com.taskflow.dto`
- Single field: `status` (String) — the target status
- Needs getter/setter

### 2. `TransitionResponse.java` (DTO)
- Package: `com.taskflow.dto`
- Fields: `currentStatus` (String), `availableTransitions` (List<String>)
- Needs getter/setter, constructor

### 3. `TaskStateMachineService.java` (Service)
- Package: `com.taskflow.service`
- Transition rules (Map<TaskStatus, List<TaskStatus>>):
  - TODO -> [IN_PROGRESS]
  - IN_PROGRESS -> [TODO, DONE]
  - DONE -> [CLOSED]
  - CLOSED -> [] (terminal)
- Methods:
  - `TaskResponse updateStatus(Long taskId, String targetStatus)` — validate transition, update task, save, return TaskResponse
  - `TransitionResponse getAvailableTransitions(Long taskId)` — look up current status, return allowed next statuses
- Throws `ResourceNotFoundException` if task not found (or task.isDeleted())
- Throws `IllegalStateTransitionException` (or similar, caught by GlobalExceptionHandler) if transition is illegal -> 400

### 4. `TaskStatusController.java` (Controller)
- Package: `com.taskflow.controller`
- Endpoints:
  - `PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status` — accepts `StatusUpdateRequest`, returns `TaskResponse`
  - `GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions` — returns `TransitionResponse`
- Both require authentication (already handled by SecurityConfig — anyRequest().authenticated())

## State Transition Diagram
```
TODO ---> IN_PROGRESS ---> DONE ---> CLOSED (terminal)
      <---
```

## Key Design Decisions
- Use an EnumMap<TaskStatus, List<TaskStatus>> for transition rules — clean and O(1) lookup
- IllegalStateException or custom exception for illegal transitions
- GlobalExceptionHandler needs a handler for the illegal transition exception -> 400
- Task entity already has @PreUpdate that sets updatedAt, so just saving the task after status change handles AC10
- Must check task.isDeleted() == false when finding task; if deleted, treat as 404

## Error Response Format
All errors follow: `{message: string, timestamp: ISO8601}` via GlobalExceptionHandler + ErrorResponse

## Test Dependencies
- Tests depend on T3 (auth) and T4 (Task entity) being implemented — both are completed
- Tests depend on T5 (POST /api/tasks for creating test tasks) — uses task creation in setUp
- If T5 is not yet implemented, tests will fail in setUp; worker-6 must implement T6 endpoints

content.text:
Now I have all the context I need. The GlobalExceptionHandler does NOT have a handler for `IllegalStateException`. I need to handle illegal transitions with a 400 response. I have two options:
1. Add an `@ExceptionHandler` in the controller itself
2. Throw a custom exception

Since I can't modify `GlobalExceptionHandler` (it's READONLY), I'll handle it in the controller with a local `@ExceptionHandler`, or I'll just catch the exception in the service/controller. Actually, the cleanest approach is to use `@ExceptionHandler` in the controller for `IllegalStateException`.

Let me now create all 4 files. I'll update my task status first.
Now let me create all 4 files. I'll start by creating them all in parallel.

input.content:
# Worker-6 Log — T6: M3 Task State Machine

## Task
T6: M3 — Task State Machine (TaskStateMachineService, TaskStatusController, StatusUpdateRequest, TransitionResponse)

## Implementation Summary

### Files Created (4)
1. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/StatusUpdateRequest.java` — DTO with `@NotNull status` field
2. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TransitionResponse.java` — DTO with `currentStatus` + `availableTransitions` list
3. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskStateMachineService.java` — State machine logic using EnumMap for transition rules
4. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskStatusController.java` — REST controller with PATCH /status and GET /transitions endpoints

### Design Decisions
- Used `EnumMap<TaskStatus, List<TaskStatus>>` for O(1) transition lookup
- Added `@ExceptionHandler` for `IllegalStateException` and `IllegalArgumentException` in controller (since GlobalExceptionHandler is READONLY and doesn't handle these)
- Task entity's `@PreUpdate` callback automatically sets `updatedAt` on save — no manual timestamp handling needed
- Reused `ResourceNotFoundException` (already handled by GlobalExceptionHandler) for 404 cases
- Soft-delete check: `findById().filter(t -> !t.isDeleted())` consistent with TaskService

### Transition Rules
- TODO -> [IN_PROGRESS]
- IN_PROGRESS -> [TODO, DONE]
- DONE -> [CLOSED]
- CLOSED -> [] (terminal)

## Test Results
- **27/27 tests PASS**
- All AC1-AC16 covered
- No out-of-scope file changes

## Timeline
- Read all required/readonly files
- Created 4 files
- First run: 27/27 PASS

3. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskStateMachineService.java` — State machine logic using EnumMap for transition rules
4. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskStatusController.java` — REST controller with PATCH /status and GET /transitions endpoints

### Design Decisions
- Used `EnumMap<TaskStatus, List<TaskStatus>>` for O(1) transition lookup
- Added `@ExceptionHandler` for `IllegalStateException` and `IllegalArgumentException` in controller (since GlobalExceptionHandler is READONLY and doesn't handle these)
- Task entity's `@PreUpdate` callback automatically sets `updatedAt` on save — no manual timestamp handling needed
- Reused `ResourceNotFoundException` (already handled by GlobalExceptionHandler) for 404 cases
- Soft-delete check: `findById().filter(t -> !t.isDeleted())` consistent with TaskService
